record_types.name: Content
Response_Kind

subtypes.name: Payload_Ptr
subtypes.code:
subtype Payload_Ptr is RFLX.RFLX_Types.Bytes_Ptr
with
  Dynamic_Predicate =>
    Payload_Ptr = null
    or else Payload_Ptr'Length <= CoAP_SPARK.Max_Payload_Length;

subtypes.name: Response_Code
subtypes.code:
subtype Response_Code is RFLX.CoAP.Code_Class
                           range RFLX.CoAP.Success .. RFLX.CoAP.Server_Error;

subprograms.name: Image
subprograms.code: function Image (Item : Response_Kind; Long : Boolean := True) return String

subprograms.name: Initialize_With_Text_Payload
Print_Content
Print_Response_Kind
